char.name: Elijah
char.bio: Elijah the Tishbite, of Gilead. I told Ahab there'd be no rain but by my word, and there wasn't, for three years. Ravens fed me; a widow's jar never ran dry; and on Carmel, fire fell from heaven. Yet I heard God not in wind or quake or fire, but in a still small voice. 🔥
